title: IVF Bioscience Bovine Slaughterhouse Protocol
steps: Dish and Media Preparation
Add 500 µL of BO-IVM medium per well to 4-well plates without an Oil overlay and place in the incubator
Additionally, prepare one 35 millimetre dish with 3 mL of BO-IVM per 4-well plate and place in the incubator without an Oil overlay
Aspiration
Warm the saline solution to 32 °C
Take note of the arrival time and temperature of the ovaries
Wash the ovaries in the warmed saline and hold in a thermo-container of warmed saline
Add 140 µL of heparin to the 50 ml tube prior to aspiration
Aspirate all follicles between 2-15 millimetres using an 18-guage needle connected to the pump system. The opening of the needle should face downwards
Aspirate no more than 20 mL of follicular fluid per tube and note the number of ovaries aspirated on the lid of the tube
Prepare and equilibrate IVM wells at 38.8 °C in 6% carbon dioxide in a humidified atmospheric air (21% oxygen) for 02:00:00 before use
Preheat the Wash medium to 36 °C
Set the heating plate to 34 °C and connect the vacuum equipment
Collection and Maturation
Use 9 cm Petri dishes marked with a square grid pattern
Prepare one dish per tube of follicular fluid. Mark the dish with the corresponding tube number.
Add 7 mL of Wash to each dish
Prepare three 35 millimetre dishes with 2.5 mL of Wash in each. Mark these dishes as 1, 2 and 3
Transfer the oocyte pellet from the bottom of the 50 ml tube into the larger petri dish using a plastic transfer pipette
Search through the dish systematically and transfer all oocytes to the smaller dish marked 1
Repeat the transferring of the oocyte pellet and search, twice for each tube
Once all oocytes have been collected, wash through dish 2 and then 3. Count the number of collected oocytes
Rinse once through the 35 millimetre dish containing BO-IVM
Once rinsed, transfer the oocytes to the 4-well plate containing BO-IVM. Do not transfer more than 45 oocytes per 500 µL well.
Incubate at 38.8 °C and 6% carbon dioxide in humidified atmospheric air (21% oxygen) for between 21:00:00 and 24:00:00 .
creator: Jake Silcock
